{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173352E588365FBEE554ABC71B"}"},"total":3977},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7538116580208673561","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级超级好看，看鬼眼的时候就很喜欢作者的文笔，我感觉写的可以和鬼舍相提并论了，很可惜鬼眼没有了，我找了好久终于找到了你的新书，作者大大加油啊，我感觉一点都不墨迹，很棒描写的很让人感觉身入其境，加油~\(≧▽≦)/~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755112016,"group_id":"7535538904091331608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6qAoOl47hzKWUDUolki0JuU6l5gPg+0qS7EYU69uHVk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/cf52bc319aa0436786bff0ed9c9b01cb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531093&x-signature=rb5bab3VLWffnb70HEvDw5E8OXQ%3D","user_id":"1011172924727885","user_name":"干脆面'▿'"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011172924727885","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535538904091331608","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流，微恐，无cp】
王彦疲惫的打开了家门。
却看到屋里，女邻居正哄抱着一个婴儿，满脸惊恐地看着他。
”不好意思，我走错门了。“
他连忙道歉退出，随后死死关上了那扇门。
站在黑漆漆的楼道里。
一时之间，他有些难以分清，到底是看到了女邻居出现在自己家里比较恐怖，还是看到了早已去世的那个婴儿比较恐怖了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99784f573c9f7db1364c751bdc5b46d8","author":"年轻熊","author_id":"","book_id":"7535538904091331608","book_name":"恐怖噩梦：我在诡异世界极限逃生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7535560160094194750","read_count":"171030","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"763697"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"308","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,穿越,无限流,灵异,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7f80363ede6fdf01923111c95a7c6e4e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183232&x-signature=ATdJcse4NoMpDXCJL%2BBn58IOgEo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173352E588365FBEE554ABC71B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":438,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1416,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3013,"reply_count":49,"show_pv":296799},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537985182320083737","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢呀，主角有智商但也不是那种碾压众人的那种，逻辑思维很清晰。剧情也超棒的，很刺激很惊悚就是有点烧脑。感叹一下这纯正的王家血统，从鬼眼到梦魇，我会永远支持作者大大的！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755075915,"group_id":"7535538904091331608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7B35AuSFXBsQxfRYPozHbq8VX7XcmMJ/pQCi2kzKWGm","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c66a412c2184fa489a9b9c2d2eafcbf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537407&x-signature=%2FXaUBf37jpsHfuMJG96PPZuMKK8%3D","user_id":"2573328867939328","user_name":"Rez米王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2573328867939328","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535538904091331608","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流，微恐，无cp】

一时之间，他有些难以分清，到底是看到了女邻居出现在自己家里比较恐怖，还是看到了早已去世的那个婴儿比较恐怖了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99784f573c9f7db1364c751bdc5b46d8","author":"年轻熊","author_id":"","book_id":"7535538904091331608","book_name":"恐怖噩梦：我在诡异世界极限逃生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7535560160094194750","read_count":"171030","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"763697"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"308","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,穿越,无限流,灵异,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7f80363ede6fdf01923111c95a7c6e4e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183232&x-signature=ATdJcse4NoMpDXCJL%2BBn58IOgEo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173352E588365FBEE554ABC71B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":74,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7526,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":88900},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542154061299303230","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，听说这作者是  噩梦鬼眼的作者，实际看着风格也很像。这本书和那本书风格一样，恐怖感很棒，反转也很不可思议，内容引人入胜。但是感觉不足的是，恐怖感没有鬼眼那一本那么足，压迫感没有那么重，并且章节过少残酷感跟生存压力没有那么深。希望后续能够引入一些在无限流中，常见的可以保命的一些道具，这样一些惊险的和判断失误导致差点gg的情节就更好展现了。也期待多一些人性对抗的情节，像鬼眼那本书中，自负者不放弃自己的骄傲，舍命骗鬼的高昂情节桥段。最后，也希望这本书能不暴死。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756047638,"group_id":"7535538904091331608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyA21edHHXUPSdWOANitB/IuQXJWau+lsNTVYb77pLVu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1935605578862195","user_name":"喜欢钝梭螺的苏胜河"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1935605578862195","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535538904091331608","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流，微恐，无cp】
